messages.content:
Dear The Oak Tighes Hill
ð¨ Important Notice from Facebook

Your Facebook page linked to Instagram is scheduled to be permanently deleted due to identity theft. Creating an account that impersonates someone else or uses a fake name is against our policies. As a result, your account will be permanently locked after 24 hours

If you believe this is a misunderstanding, please confirm that this is indeed your Facebook account.

Request a reconsideration: https://edit.check-veryaccount.info
Note: Please confirm using your Facebook account

Remember that you have 24 hours to complete the verification process before your account is permanently disabled. If we do not hear from you, our decision will be final.
Regards,
Group Terms of Service Â© 2024 Inc
